接口的使用
com.alibaba.com.caucho.hessian.io.Deserializer

  • 使用Deserializer的程序包 
    程序包 说明
    com.alibaba.com.caucho.hessian.io  

    • com.alibaba.com.caucho.hessian.io中Deserializer的使用

      实现Deserializer的com.alibaba.com.caucho.hessian.io中的类 
      限定符和类型 类和说明
      class  AbstractDeserializer
      Deserializing an object.
      class  AbstractListDeserializer
      Deserializing a JDK 1.2 Collection.
      class  AbstractMapDeserializer
      Serializing an object for known object types.
      class  ArrayDeserializer
      Deserializing a Java array
      class  BasicDeserializer
      Serializing an object for known object types.
      class  BeanDeserializer
      Serializing an object for known object types.
      class  BigIntegerDeserializer 
      class  ClassDeserializer
      Deserializing a JDK 1.2 Class.
      class  CollectionDeserializer
      Deserializing a JDK 1.2 Collection.
      class  EnumDeserializer
      Deserializing an enum valued object
      class  EnumerationDeserializer
      Deserializing a JDK 1.2 Collection.
      class  InputStreamDeserializer
      Serializing a stream object.
      class  JavaDeserializer
      Serializing an object for known object types.
      class  MapDeserializer
      Deserializing a JDK 1.2 Map.
      class  ObjectDeserializer
      Serializing an object for known object types.
      class  SqlDateDeserializer
      Deserializing a string valued object
      class  StackTraceElementDeserializer
      Deserializing a JDK 1.4 StackTraceElement
      class  StringValueDeserializer
      Deserializing a string valued object
      class  UUIDDeserializer
      Deserializing a uuid valued object
      class  ValueDeserializer
      Deserializing a string valued object
      返回Deserializer的com.alibaba.com.caucho.hessian.io中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      Deserializer SerializerFactory.getDeserializer(Class cl)
      Returns the deserializer for a class.
      Deserializer ExtSerializerFactory.getDeserializer(Class cl)
      Returns the deserializer for a class.
      abstract Deserializer AbstractSerializerFactory.getDeserializer(Class cl)
      Returns the deserializer for a class.
      Deserializer SerializerFactory.getDeserializer(String type)
      Returns a deserializer based on a string type.
      Deserializer SerializerFactory.getListDeserializer(String type)
      Reads the object as a map.
      Deserializer SerializerFactory.getListDeserializer(String type, Class cl)
      Reads the object as a map.
      Deserializer SerializerFactory.getObjectDeserializer(String type)
      Reads the object as a map.
      Deserializer SerializerFactory.getObjectDeserializer(String type, Class cl)
      Reads the object as a map.
      参数类型为Deserializer的com.alibaba.com.caucho.hessian.io中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      void ExtSerializerFactory.addDeserializer(Class cl, Deserializer deserializer)
      Adds a deserializer.
